item.title: Complete SaaS Security Solution - Obsidian Security
item.description: Obsidian Security delivers complete SaaS security—gain control, stop threats, and ensure compliance across all your business apps.

item.title: SaaS Identity Threat Detection & Response | SaaS ITDR Solution — Obsidian Security
item.description: Detect and respond to identity threats across SaaS apps with unified visibility and real-time response capabilities.

item.title: Stop Risky SaaS Configuration Drift
item.description: Identify and correct SaaS config drift before it creates vulnerabilities. Obsidian brings stability to your SaaS setup.

item.title: Secure SaaS Tokens from Misuse
item.description: Prevent stolen or abused access tokens from becoming breaches. Obsidian delivers visibility and response across SaaS.

item.title: Spear Phishing Protection for SaaS
item.description: Identify and block spear phishing attempts that target SaaS users with Obsidian’s behavioral detection and visibility.

item.title: Stop Data Exfiltration Threats Early
item.description: Monitor and detect threats in SaaS apps before data leaves your environment with Obsidian’s advanced analytics.

item.title: Shadow SaaS Management | Obsidian Security
item.description: Discover, manage, and control Shadow SaaS across your organization with Obsidian Security.

item.title: Manage SaaS Data Movement Securely
item.description: Control and monitor data flow between SaaS apps to prevent leaks and ensure secure, compliant data sharing.

item.title: Manage Excessive Privileges in SaaS
item.description: Gain visibility into user roles and permissions to enforce least privilege and protect critical SaaS data from misuse.

item.title: Automate SaaS Compliance
item.description: Streamline compliance across SaaS apps with automated monitoring, audit readiness, and continuous policy enforcement.

item.title: SaaS Security Platform Technology
item.description: Learn about Obsidian’s cutting-edge platform that secures SaaS apps through continuous monitoring and identity protection.

item.title: Obsidian Partners & Alliances
item.description: Discover how Obsidian partners with industry leaders to deliver comprehensive SaaS security and threat detection.

item.title: SaaS Security Resources & Insights
item.description: Explore expert content and resources from Obsidian to strengthen your SaaS security knowledge and strategy.

item.title: Latest SaaS Security News & Tips
item.description: Get the latest updates, threat analysis, and best practices from Obsidian’s SaaS security blog.

item.title: Obsidian Security News & Press Releases
item.description: Discover recent updates, media coverage, and official press releases from Obsidian Security.

item.title: Join the Obsidian Security Team
item.description: Discover rewarding cybersecurity jobs and be part of a mission-driven team protecting SaaS environments.

item.title: SaaS Security Demo | Obsidian Security
item.description: Book a demo with Obsidian Security to uncover SaaS blind spots, stop identity-based breaches, and protect your data with tailored insights from our experts.

item.title: What is SaaS Security?
item.description: Discover how SaaS security works and why it’s critical for safeguarding your cloud-based applications.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: Learn about Obsidian’s data privacy policies designed to protect your information securely and transparently.

item.title: Responsible Disclosure Policy
item.description: Guidelines for responsible reporting of security issues to keep Obsidian’s systems safe and secure.
